message:
feat(lua): implement closure upvalue capture + fix rawset, conformance updates

Lua upvalue capture (closes frankenredis-yc3):
- Add captured_env field to LuaFunc for lexical scope snapshots
- Function definitions capture current environment via Env::snapshot()
- call_function restores captured env before executing function body
- Closures now correctly access variables from enclosing scopes

Other fixes:
- rawset: clone mutated table instead of swap (swap destroyed original)
- cjson: fix misleading "stub" comment (implementation is complete)
- Runtime.server made pub for fr-server access
- SHUTDOWN: use return ExitCode::SUCCESS instead of break
- Conformance fixtures updated for maxmemory-samples ordering and
  SORT_RO arity error message

Closes: frankenredis-yc3, frankenredis-vmw

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
